robes.name: Apprentice's Robe
robes.desc: Simple gray robe worn by those who have not yet taken the Test.

robes.name: White Robe
robes.desc: The white robes of a mage devoted to Solinari. +1 to saves vs. necromancy spells.

robes.name: Red Robe
robes.desc: The red robes of a mage devoted to Lunitari. +1 to Arcana checks.

robes.name: Black Robe
robes.desc: The black robes of a mage devoted to Nuitari. +1 to Intimidation checks.

arcaneFoci.name: Arcane Focus (Crystal)
arcaneFoci.desc: A crystal orb that serves as a spellcasting focus.

arcaneFoci.name: Arcane Focus (Orb)
arcaneFoci.desc: A glass orb that glows faintly when held.

arcaneFoci.name: Arcane Focus (Rod)
arcaneFoci.desc: A short rod inscribed with arcane symbols.

arcaneFoci.name: Arcane Focus (Staff)
arcaneFoci.desc: A wooden staff capped with crystal or metal.

arcaneFoci.name: Arcane Focus (Wand)
arcaneFoci.desc: A slender wand of wood or bone.

arcaneFoci.name: Component Pouch
arcaneFoci.desc: A leather belt pouch containing spell components.

arcaneFoci.name: Spellbook
arcaneFoci.desc: A leather-bound tome with 100 pages of blank vellum.

adventuringGear.name: Bandage
adventuringGear.desc: Stabilize a creature at 0 HP without a Medicine check.

adventuringGear.name: Candle
adventuringGear.desc: Bright light 5 ft, dim light 5 ft more. Burns for 1 hour.

adventuringGear.name: Hooded Lantern
adventuringGear.desc: Bright light 30 ft, dim 30 ft more. Burns 6 hrs on 1 pint of oil.

adventuringGear.name: Scholar's Pack
adventuringGear.contents: Backpack, Book, Ink, Ink Pen, Lamp, Oil (10), Paper (10), Parchment (10), Tinderbox

potions.name: Potion of Greater Mana
potions.desc: Recover one expended spell slot of 2nd level or lower.

potions.name: Potion of Fire Resistance
potions.desc: Resistance to Fire damage for 1 hour.

potions.name: Antitoxin
potions.desc: Advantage on saves vs. poison for 1 hour.

spellComponents.name: Owl Feather
spellComponents.desc: Material component for various divination spells.

magicItems.name: Wand of Magic Detection
magicItems.desc: Expend 1 charge to cast Detect Magic. Regains 1d3 charges at dawn.

magicItems.name: Hat of Wizardry
magicItems.desc: While wearing this hat, you can use it as a spellcasting focus. Once per long rest, try to cast a cantrip you don't know (DC 10 Arcana check).

magicItems.name: Cloak of Protection
magicItems.desc: +1 bonus to AC and saving throws.

magicItems.name: Ring of Spell Storing
magicItems.desc: Store up to 5 levels worth of spells. Any creature can cast stored spells.

magicItems.name: Staff of the Adder
magicItems.desc: Use bonus action to animate staff head as venomous snake. Melee spell attack, 1d6 pierce + DC 15 CON save or 3d6 poison.

magicItems.name: Amulet of Proof Against Detection
magicItems.desc: You are hidden from divination magic. Can't be targeted by such magic or perceived through magical scrying.

magicItems.name: Pearl of Power
magicItems.desc: Once per dawn, recover one expended spell slot of 3rd level or lower.

magicItems.name: Robe of Useful Items
magicItems.desc: Detach patches to create items: dagger, lantern, mirror, pole, rope, sack.

attacks.name: Multiattack
attacks.desc: Two claw attacks or one claw and one bite

traits.name: Death Throes
traits.desc: When killed, a Sivak assumes the form of the creature that killed it (if Medium or smaller humanoid) for 3 days, then crumbles to powder.

traits.name: Glide
traits.desc: Can glide 60 feet without losing altitude.

traits.name: Spell Reflection
traits.desc: When targeted by a spell, roll d6. On 6, spell is reflected back at caster.

traits.name: Your Worst Self
traits.desc: Creature has disadvantage on the first attack roll against the construct each turn (it's hard to strike your own reflection).

traits.name: Incorporeal Movement
traits.desc: Can move through other creatures and objects as if difficult terrain. Takes 1d10 force damage if ending turn inside an object.

traits.name: Bound to Tower
traits.desc: Cannot leave the Tower of High Sorcery.

attacks.name: Manifestation
attacks.desc: This attack takes a form unique to the target — a person they failed, a choice they regret.

traits.name: Born of Regret
traits.desc: The Unresolved Thing is formed from the target's deepest regret. It knows their secrets.

traits.name: Second Chance
traits.desc: If the target speaks the truth of what they regret, the Thing hesitates (loses its next turn).
